message:
test(sync): add atomic export pipeline tests

12 new tests covering sync export edge cases:
- Concurrent exports produce valid output (thread safety)
- Path traversal rejected at runtime (not just preflight)
- Paths outside beads_dir rejected with beads_dir set
- .git paths rejected even with allow_external_jsonl flag
- Temp file cleanup verification after failure
- Re-export overwrites previous output cleanly
- Successive identical exports are idempotent (same hash)
- Every exported line is valid JSONL with required fields
- Symlink escape in export path is rejected
- External export with flag works for valid paths
- Export count matches actual file line count
- All exported IDs are unique

Closes: beads_rust-3hls

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
